mapper.insert: insert into user(id, pw, email, phone) values(#{id}, #{pw}, #{email}, #{phone})
mapper.select: select * from user where id = #{id} and pw = #{pw}
mapper.update: update user set lastlogin = now() where id = #{id}
update user set pw=#{pw}, email=#{email}, phone=#{phone}, moddate=now() where id=#{id}
